tasks.label: Restart Streamlit
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502

tasks.label: Test xlsm row count
tasks.command:
/usr/bin/python3 -c "
import openpyxl, sys
f = 'FINAL COMPARABLE SPREADSHEET 2026.xlsm'
print('--- read_only=False (normal mode) ---')
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(f, data_only=True, keep_vba=False)
ws = wb.active
rows = [r for r in ws.iter_rows(values_only=True) if any(v is not None for v in r)]
print('rows found:', len(rows))
print('--- read_only=True ---')
wb2 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f, read_only=True, data_only=True)
ws2 = wb2.active
rows2 = [r for r in ws2.iter_rows(values_only=True) if any(v is not None for v in r)]
print('rows found:', len(rows2))
"

tasks.label: Test xlsm rows
tasks.command:
/usr/bin/python3 -c "
import openpyxl
f = '/home/filipejrcorreia/Downloads/FINAL COMPARABLE SPREADSHEET 2026.xlsm'
print('--- read_only=False ---')
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(f, data_only=True, keep_vba=False)
ws = wb.active
rows = [r for r in ws.iter_rows(values_only=True) if any(v is not None for v in r)]
print('rows:', len(rows))
print('--- read_only=True ---')
wb2 = openpyxl.load_workbook(f, read_only=True, data_only=True)
ws2 = wb2.active
rows2 = [r for r in ws2.iter_rows(values_only=True) if any(v is not None for v in r)]
print('rows:', len(rows2))
"

tasks.label: Restart Streamlit Debug
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' ; sleep 2 && /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502

tasks.label: Restart App
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' ; sleep 3 ; /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502

tasks.label: Streamlit Start Fresh
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' ; sleep 2 ; /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502

tasks.label: Streamlit Live
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' ; sleep 2 ; exec /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502

tasks.label: Streamlit Nohup
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' ; sleep 1 ; nohup /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502 > /tmp/streamlit.log 2>&1 & echo "Started PID $!" && sleep 4 && grep -m2 'Local URL\|ERROR\|Error' /tmp/streamlit.log

tasks.label: Restart App Final
tasks.command: pkill -f 'streamlit run' ; sleep 2 ; exec /usr/bin/python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502
